overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a science fiction video game showing a character in a white suit walking through a futuristic, upscale lobby toward a Vanguard faction reception desk, then turning left and proceeding toward an exit archway. The environment features sleek metallic and glass architecture with artificial lighting.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a modern lobby toward the illuminated Vanguard reception desk

notable_agents.action: seated at an office workstation on the left side

entered.detail: large curved reception desk with illuminated orange VANGUARD signage on the wall behind it
elevator doors with metallic finish and MAST signage above
tall curved glass wall with metallic structural frames
wooden desk with a seated worker and office chair
row of spherical white pendant lights hanging from the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a spacious, carpeted lobby with modern architecture. Spherical lights hang from the ceiling above, while a curved glass wall runs along the right side. Ahead, the Vanguard reception desk glows with orange signage, and an office worker sits at a desk to the left.

events.description: character reaches the reception desk and begins turning left to walk alongside it

agents.ego_description: approaching the reception desk, then turning left to walk along its length while passing the receptionist

notable_agents.action: Vanguard receptionist standing behind the desk holding a tablet device

entered.detail: uniformed receptionist standing behind the white curved desk

segments.scene_description: The character arrives at the Vanguard reception desk where a uniformed receptionist stands behind the counter. The character turns left and walks alongside the desk, passing the receptionist. The elevator and initial office area fall behind as the character moves past the reception area.

scene_state.functional_zone: lobby exit corridor with geometric archway

events.description: passing the reception desk completely and heading toward the large exit archway

agents.ego_description: walking away from the reception area toward a large geometric archway exit

entered.detail: large geometric archway with angular white structural beams leading to exterior
modern curved sofa with light cushions and wooden base
tall information stand with blue and green signage panels

segments.scene_description: Having passed the reception desk, the character walks toward a striking geometric archway that serves as the exit. Modern curved sofas and an information kiosk line the right side of the corridor. The reception area falls behind as the character approaches the archway leading out of the lobby.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sleek, futuristic lobby that transitions from a wide reception area toward a geometric exit archway. It begins with the character walking across a spacious carpeted floor beneath spherical ceiling lights, moving past a curved glass wall toward a glowing orange Vanguard reception desk. As the character reaches the desk, the camera pivots left to follow them past a uniformed receptionist, leaving the elevators and initial office area behind. The scene then opens into a corridor lined with modern curved sofas and an information kiosk before finally approaching a striking geometric archway that leads out of the lobby.
